data.title: Update SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md and WORKTREE-GUIDE.md for worktree isolation
data.description:
## Description

1. Update SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md to document:
   a. Allowlist replaces categorical block for worktree isolation
   b. Sub-agents must NOT commit in worktrees (implement only)
   c. Artifact isolation semantics (ARTIFACTS_DIR resolves per worktree via REPO_ROOT hash)
   d. Review/test state flows through worktree ARTIFACTS_DIR

2. Update WORKTREE-GUIDE.md to cover:
   a. Per-agent worktrees created by isolation:worktree parameter
   b. Worktree lifecycle: create → implement → review → commit → merge → cleanup
   c. Retention protocol (worktree retained until merge complete)

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md (EDIT)

### TDD Exemption
Unit test exemption — criterion 3: static documentation files, no conditional logic.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md documents allowlist
  Verify: grep -qi 'allowlist\|auth.*marker\|authorized' plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md
- [ ] SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md documents no-commit constraint
  Verify: grep -qi 'must NOT commit\|prohibit.*commit\|implement only' plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md
- [ ] WORKTREE-GUIDE.md covers per-agent worktrees
  Verify: grep -qi 'per.agent.*worktree\|isolation.*worktree\|worktree.*isolation' plugins/dso/docs/WORKTREE-GUIDE.md
